properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v5 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will bless the Lord forever And I will trust Him at all times He has delivered me from all fear And He has set my feet upon a rock

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will not be moved, and I'll say of the Lord You are my shield, my strength, my portion Deliverer, my shelter, strong tower My very present help in time of need

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Whom have I in heaven but You There's none I desire beside You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For You have made me glad, and I'll say of the Lord You are my shield, my strength, my portion Deliverer, my shelter, strong tower My very present help

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are my shield, my strength, my portion Deliverer, my shelter, strong tower My very present help in time of need

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You have made me glad, and I'll say of the Lord You are my shield, my strength, my portion Deliverer, my shelter, strong tower My very present help

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: My very present help in time of need My very present help in time of need
